candidates.why: Clean reported total for current interest-bearing debt; under IFRS this best captures short-term debt/current portion of debt. Preferred to components because components include lease liabilities and selecting only non-lease components avoids double counting.
Current bank debt component, but appears to be only part of short-term debt.
Current borrowing component and shortlisted candidate, but only part of STD.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Lease liabilities' per rule. Did not use 'Total current interest-bearing liabilities' because it clearly includes lease liabilities in the breakdown. Selected the minimal visible non-lease current debt components instead.
